questions.question_text: Has the business identified and documented the potential impact on individuals' privacy and considered this when installing and operating the CCTV system?
Comments - Has the business identified and documented the potential impact on individuals' privacy and considered this when installing and operating the CCTV system?
Have you paid the data protection fee to the Information Commissioner Office (ICO)?
Comments - Have you paid the data protection fee to the Information Commissioner Office (ICO)?
Do you have a CCTV policy and a nominated individual responsible for the operation of the CCTV system?
Comments - Do you have a CCTV policy and a nominated individual responsible for the operation of the CCTV system?
Do you have a process for recognising and responding to requests for copies of images on your CCTV footage?
Comments - Do you have a process for recognising and responding to requests for copies of images on your CCTV footage?
Are your staff trained to operate the system (if applicable) and recognise requests for CCTV information/Images?
Comments - Are your staff trained to operate the system (if applicable) and recognise requests for CCTV information/Images?
Do you retain the recorded images for the minimum time needed to allow any incident to come to light and be investigated, but not any longer than necessary?
Comments - Do you retain the recorded images for the minimum time needed to allow any incident to come to light and be investigated, but not any longer than necessary?
Have you ensured that the CCTV images are clear and of high quality?
Comments - Have you ensured that the CCTV images are clear and of high quality?
Do you limit access to CCTV images to authorised individuals and conduct regular checks to ensure the CCTV system works correctly?
Comments - Do you limit access to CCTV images to authorised individuals and conduct regular checks to ensure the CCTV system works correctly?
Do you inform individuals within your business that you are using CCTV?
Comments - Do you inform individuals within your business that you are using CCTV?
